welcome.description: Welcome to <italic>Romance in the Tower</italic>, the place where you can discover which character from <link/> would be a compatible partner for you!

landing.description: Are you ready to discover your ideal match in the world of L4G? :D
landing.newTitle: Do you want to add a new character?
landing.description2: Answer the following questions from the perspective of the character you want to add to the test.
landing.idExplanation: * A simple, unique identifier (e.g. first name). Only lowercase Latin letters. Make sure it hasn't been used for another character. If needed, ask Tori.

login.text: You need to login to continue Q.Q

faq.a1: This platform offers a personality quiz test to determine what character from La Cuarta Generacion in Scripta Manent has higher (romantic) compatibility with you or, maybe, even with your original characters! Keep in mind this project was made for fun, so please take it as such. Enjoy <3
faq.a2: Scripta Manent (SM) is a Spanish web forum dedicated to role-play. It offers a couple of different settings, one of them being La Cuarta Generación, the one that contains the characters used in this quiz.
faq.q3: What is roleplay? What are RP forums?
faq.a3:
Roleplaying (RP) is a form of collaborative storytelling where people create characters and develop scenes/stories together, each controlling only their own character's actions, dialogue, etc. and taking turns to interact. Unlike tabletop RPGs (eg. D&D), narrative RP (mostly used in web forums or other writing-oriented online platforms) focus more on character interaction and long-term story development than game mechanics.
RP web forums are online communities built around this style of writing. Users usually create an account for their character, join threads of specific events and post written replies as said characters.
faq.a4: The most popular story-setting in SM, inspired in the book series "Cronicas de la Torre" by Laura Gallego García. It presents a medieval fantasy world focused on a magic school, the Tower (Torre) and an open world that includes multiple cultures and supernatural creatures.
faq.q5: Can I add characters to the list? Can I modify any of them?
faq.a5: For security reasons and proper control over the test, access to the data involving available characters displayed in the test results is open only to members of the forum and creators of said characters.
faq.a6:
All the code and most of the text content on this platform were created by TVBBY.P (me).
The first person to have the idea for the test was one of the forum users, Efimero, but the project was abandoned. I decided to pick it up again when I wanted to test my React skills after completing a course.
Thanks to Eine Krone for making the page's icon.
The characters and their descriptions were created by their respective owners on SM.
The images on the Home page were created with picrew. Credits for the character images can be found in the character list and in the test results.
faq.a7: Is there anything else you'd like to know? Did you find any errors or bugs? Would you like to suggest an improvement to the quiz or just share a word? Feel free to send a report!

q4.question: When it comes to work/tasks, you...

answers.responsable: Do it as soon as possible.
answers.irresponsable: Meh, I'll do it tomorrow... (like that for the whole month)
answers.medio: I focus on what's important first; the rest I'll figure out later.

answers.rutina: Routine, knowing what's next, having control over your life
answers.medio: A bit of both. Calm is great, but sometimes a bit of adrenaline is nice

answers.si: YES PLEASE. KISSES AND HUGS FOREVER
answers.medio: With friends/family okay sometimes. With strangers only if necessary; preferably not.

q11.question: When there is conflict, you tend to be...

answers.lento: Take your time. You may struggle or prefer to analyze things carefully.
answers.rapido: You feel them as they come. You have no problem experiencing them, good or bad, and you prefer to accept them quickly.
answers.no: Emotions? Absolutely not, a waste of time.

answers.medio: You have potential, but lack interest/resources

answers.empatico: Offer emotional support first and focus on making them feel better
answers.solucionador: Look for solutions directly. A few kind words won't change the situation.

q19.question: You would prefer a partner who is more...

q23.question: You would like your partner to be...

answers.no: Doesn't like people... and you enjoy suffering clearly
